SurvivalNotifierConfiguration.FoodWarningMessage: You are starting to feel hungry. [50% Hunger]
SurvivalNotifierConfiguration.FoodDangerMessage: You are starving. Find food soon! [25% Hunger]
SurvivalNotifierConfiguration.FoodCriticalMessage: WARNING: You are about to die of starvation! [5% Hunger]
SurvivalNotifierConfiguration.WaterWarningMessage: You are starting to feel thirsty. [50% Thirst]
SurvivalNotifierConfiguration.WaterDangerMessage: You are dehydrated. Find water soon! [25% Thirst]
SurvivalNotifierConfiguration.WaterCriticalMessage: WARNING: You are about to die of dehydration! [5% Thirst]
